title: Melanoseris oligolepis
intro: Melanoseris oligolepis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Melanoseris oligolepis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Melanoseris oligolepis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being formulated into capsules or tablets, to take advantage of its health benefits.
taxonomy: Melanoseris oligolepis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. The plant is classified in the genus Melanoseris, which belongs to the tribe Cichorieae.
